title: Report about Trump, sexual abuse charges is fabricated | Fact check
shortDescription: The Associated Press did not report this, a spokesperson said. Site searches yielded no such articles by the AP.

title: 'I'm pleading': Top House Dem Adam Smith calls on President Biden to quit race
shortDescription: Rep. Adam Smith, D-Wash., is one of the most senior Democratic lawmakers to demand that Biden quit the race.

title: RNC proposed platform backs Trump on abortion, immigration
shortDescription: A Republican convention committee endorsed a party platform Monday that reads almost like a Donald Trump speech, including on abortion rights.

title: Parkinson's experts visited White House eight times
shortDescription: The logs, released by the White House, document visits from July 2023 through March of this year. The last recorded visit occured on March 28.

title: Biden campaign continues push for Latino voter support
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's campaign held an event in Glendale around the Copa América to drive the support of Latino and young voters.

title: Can any Democrat force Biden to drop out of the presidential race?
shortDescription: As concern grows among some lawmakers and voters after the June 27 presidential debate, some are asking if Biden can be replaced as the nominee.

title: Biden's post-debate slump in the polls
shortDescription: Amid all the doom scrolling, a glimmer of hope for Biden's polling numbers as he narrows Trump's lead in seven swing states.

title: Donald Trump's GOP details a beer-themed convention in Milwaukee
shortDescription: Pubs and breweries will be frequent sites for meetings of various state delegations and interest groups, according to a schedule.

title: Donald Trump seeks immunity in other cases after Supreme Court ruling
shortDescription: Judges in Donald Trump's other criminal cases are weighing whether he's immune from charges as a former president, in wake of Supreme Court ruling.

title: Biden lashes out at Dem 'elites': 'Run against me'
shortDescription: The president phoned into MSNBC's 'Morning Joe' program to vent about his Democratic critics

title: Radio host resigns after using questions given by Biden team
shortDescription: WURD Radio announced it has parted ways with a host after she used questions given by President Joe Biden’s team in an interview with him.

title: Who are the Dem members of Congress calling for Biden to step aside?
shortDescription: Lawmakers return to Capitol Hill amid growing anxiety about Biden’s status as the top of the Democratic ticket in this November’s election.

title: Rep. Quigley: More Democrats will join call for Biden to leave race
shortDescription: Illinois Democrat Mike Quigley told CNN Monday his mind is made that Biden should end his campaign, and that he believes more lawmakers will agree.

title: Biden digs in during ABC interview | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Former President Donald Trump raked in big money from foreign nations. | AI is throwing a wrench in the debate around college degrees.

title: Biden pushes back on 2024 exit in call to ‘Morning Joe’
shortDescription: President Biden swung back on Monday in a 'Morning Joe' interview, saying "The bottom line here is that we are not going anywhere."

title: Kamala Harris 'increasing' campaign role, Biden co-chair says
shortDescription: Two governors touted as possible Biden replacements, Gavin Newsom of California, and Gretchen Whitmer of Michigan, say they support the president.

title: Dem's fighting words - Biden says he won't drop out: Live
shortDescription: All eyes are on Washington as Democrats question whether President Joe Biden should drop his reelection bid.

title: David Axelrod says Biden's 'not winning' the 2024 race
shortDescription: Former Obama advisor David Axelrod said Sunday he thinks it’s more likely Biden will lose the 2024 race “by a landslide" than narrowly beat Trump.

title: John Fetterman defends Biden amid calls for president to exit race
shortDescription: The Pennsylvania senator told CNN Monday, "That's our guy," in reference to Biden.

title: Biden to Democrats: I'm not dropping out of 2024 race
shortDescription: President Joe Biden told congressional Democrats in a Monday letter he's "committed to staying" in the presidential race and beating Donald Trump.

title: Biden vows to continue fighting Trump while campaigning
shortDescription: President Joe Biden spoke to his supporters in Pennsylvania after his rocky debate performance against Donald Trump.

title: 'It's crazy - what do we do now?': France's surprise left-wing election surge
shortDescription: French President Emmanuel Macron called a snap vote to keep right-wing forces at bay. It ended in deadlock, a resurgent left and a leadership crisis.

title: Joe Biden is hosting a high-stakes NATO summit after debate disaster
shortDescription: President Joe Biden will host a pivotal NATO summit in Washington with U.S. allies as Democrats try to stabilize a reelection campaign in crisis.

title: Elise Stefanik is a GOP superstar. Is it enough to be Trump's VP?
shortDescription: Elise Stefanik has defended Trump through impeachment and an insurrection. Now the New Yorker's loyalty has landed her on his VP vetting list.

title: 4 senior Democrats say Biden should exit race; one plans to go public with concerns
shortDescription: The private call comes ahead of lawmakers' return to Washington in a pivotal week for Biden's future. At least one plans to go public with his concerns.
